name: Vendor Onboarding — Indian Company
description: Document verification for onboarding Indian vendors/suppliers. Covers company registration, tax compliance, banking details, and authorized signatory verification. Supports Private Limited, LLP, Proprietorship, and Partnership firms.

promptConfig.role: a document verification specialist for Indian corporate and vendor onboarding compliance
promptConfig.organizationContext: You extract structured data from company registration, tax, banking, and identity documents for vendor onboarding. This extracted data will be used to verify mandatory vendor registration requirements.

nameMatching.customGuidance: For company names, 'Pvt' vs 'Private', 'Ltd' vs 'Limited' are acceptable variations. Check that the company name on documents matches the registered name. For proprietorship firms, the proprietor's name may appear instead of the firm name.

promptConfig.customInstructions:
Normalize company names consistently (Pvt/Private, Ltd/Limited are equivalent). Dates should be in DD/MM/YYYY format. Flag expired documents, inactive registrations, and name mismatches.

For each document, extract all requested fields precisely as they appear. If a field is not visible or illegible, set its value to null and note the issue in anomalies. Pay special attention to: (1) company name consistency across documents, (2) GSTIN must embed the company PAN, (3) CIN format validation, (4) MSME/Udyam registration number format, (5) bank details must match the company name.

documentTypes.label: Certificate of Incorporation
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: Certificate of Incorporation issued by the Registrar of Companies (MCA), India. This document proves the company's legal existence. For LLPs, this may be an LLP Agreement or Certificate of Registration.

expectedFields.name: cin
expectedFields.label: CIN / LLPIN
expectedFields.description: Corporate Identification Number (21 chars) or LLP Identification Number

expectedFields.name: company_type
expectedFields.label: Company Type
expectedFields.description: Private Limited / Public Limited / LLP / One Person Company

expectedFields.name: directors
expectedFields.label: Directors / Partners
expectedFields.description: Comma-separated list of initial directors or designated partners

cin.format: CIN: L/U + 5 digits + 2 letters + 4 digits + 3 letters + 6 digits + 1 digit. LLPIN: AAA-1234
cin.instructions: CIN is 21 characters. First character is L (listed) or U (unlisted). If document is for LLP, extract the LLPIN instead.

flagConditions: Document is a photocopy without MCA stamp

documentTypes.label: Company PAN Card
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: Permanent Account Number (PAN) card issued by the Income Tax Department of India for a company or firm. The 4th character indicates entity type: C=Company, F=Firm, H=HUF, T=Trust.

expectedFields.name: pan_holder_status
expectedFields.label: PAN Holder Status
expectedFields.description: Company / Firm / Association of Persons etc.

pan_number.instructions: 4th character determines entity type: C=Company, F=Firm, H=HUF, A=Association, T=Trust, P=Individual

flagConditions: 4th character does not match expected entity type

documentTypes.label: GST Registration Certificate
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: GST Registration Certificate issued by the Goods and Services Tax Network (GSTN). The GSTIN is a 15-character number where characters 3-12 are the entity's PAN.

gstin.instructions: Characters 3-12 of the GSTIN must match the entity PAN. Verify this relationship.

flagConditions: PAN embedded in GSTIN does not match company PAN

documentTypes.label: MSME / Udyam Registration
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: Udyam Registration Certificate (formerly MSME registration) issued by the Ministry of MSME, Government of India. This certifies the enterprise as Micro, Small, or Medium.
flagConditions: Enterprise name does not match company name
This is an old EM-II/UAM certificate (should be migrated to Udyam)

documentTypes.label: Cancelled Cheque / Bank Proof
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: A cancelled cheque or bank account verification letter showing the company's bank account details. Must clearly show account holder name, account number, IFSC code, and bank name.

ifsc_code.instructions: IFSC is always 11 characters. 5th character is always 0.

flagConditions: 'CANCELLED' is not written on the cheque (if cheque, not bank letter)
Account holder name does not match company name
Details are illegible or partially visible

documentTypes.label: Authorized Signatory PAN / ID
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: Government-issued identity document (PAN card, Aadhaar, Passport, or Voter ID) of the authorized signatory or director of the vendor company. This verifies the individual who signs on behalf of the company.

expectedFields.name: id_number
expectedFields.label: ID Number
expectedFields.description: PAN / Aadhaar last 4 / Passport number etc.

id_number.instructions: For Aadhaar, extract ONLY the last 4 digits for privacy. For PAN, extract the full 10-character number. For Passport, extract the full passport number.

documentTypes.label: Board Resolution / Authorization Letter
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: Board resolution or authorization letter appointing the authorized signatory who can sign agreements and documents on behalf of the company. For proprietorships, this may be a self-declaration.

expectedFields.name: scope
expectedFields.label: Scope of Authorization
expectedFields.description: What the signatory is authorized to do

flagConditions: Resolution does not mention signing authority

validations.message: IFSC must be 11 characters: 4 letters + 0 + 6 alphanumeric
CIN must be 21 characters in MCA format

crossDocRules.description: Company name on PAN must match the name on Certificate of Incorporation
Company name on PAN must match the legal name on GST certificate
The PAN number must be embedded within the GSTIN (characters 3-12 of GSTIN should match the PAN)
Company name on PAN must match the account holder name on cancelled cheque
Registered office address on Certificate of Incorporation should be consistent with the principal place of business on GST certificate
The authorized signatory's name (from their ID) must appear in the board resolution as an authorized person
Enterprise name on MSME/Udyam certificate must match the entity name on PAN
